pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode for Java 17 instead of 21 if these properties are not updated to match the target JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on Java 21 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version supporting Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may not support the `--release 21` flag or Java 21 bytecode generation.
